emails.subject: Letter agreement re LM 6000
emails.body: Letter agreement re LM 6000 Hi there. I made changes in accordance with our meeting on Friday. Please let me know what other changes you would like to see. Thanks, Kay

emails.subject: Re: Letter agreement re LM 6000
emails.body: Always! Ben F Jacoby@ECT 10/02/2000 03:16 PM Sent by: Ben Jacoby@ECT

emails.subject: Re: Letter agreement re LM 6000
emails.body: Re: Letter agreement re LM 6000 Kay: Looks good. I would suggest we have Lisa Bills look at it as well. Regards, Ben From: Kay Mann ENRON 10/02/2000 12:03 PM
